app.name: WhackSmacker
review.noneDue: No new cards to review right now.
review.previewArmed: Press Enter or Space to start review in this pane.
review.previewSelect: Press Enter once to select this deck, then press Enter or Space to start review here.
settings.chooseSourceLanguage: Choose the language WhackSmacker uses for menus and status text.
pane.installedModulesHelp: Installed modules are usable/openable. Content packages are read-only; user progress stays outside package directories.
pane.readContentHelp: Select a content item to preview it here. Markdown-like source is styled for terminal reading.
pane.reviewDecksHelp: Select a review deck to see details, then press Enter again to start review.
pane.availableHelp: Enter opens module information. Space installs selected available content packages. Selecting a module does not auto-install it.
pane.noCatalogue: No catalogue path was supplied. Launch with --catalogue <catalogue.json> to list installable modules.
uninstall.removesPackage: Uninstall removes the installed read-only package content and package registry entry.
uninstall.keepsProgress: Saved user data and review progress are kept by default.
uninstall.choose: Press Enter or U to choose uninstall behavior.
